name: Crabmeat Au Gratin
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the chopped green onions and sauté until soft, about 5 minutes.
3. Stir in flour and cook for an additional minute, ensuring no lumps form.
4. Gradually whisk in the evaporated milk, maintaining constant motion to avoid curdling.
5. Add the Swiss cheese slices, white wine, salt, pepper, and cayenne pepper (to taste).
6. Gently fold in the crab meat until evenly distributed throughout the mixture.
7. Transfer the dish to a greased baking dish and top with additional cheese if desired.
8. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for about 25-30 minutes, or until bubbly and golden brown.
